nasb.text: Now when Micaiah the son of Gemariah, the son of Shaphan, had heard all the words of the Lord from the book,

esv.text: When Micaiah the son of Gemariah, son of Shaphan, heard all the words of the Lord from the scroll,

cnv.text: 沙番的孫子基瑪利雅的兒子米該亞，聽見了書上耶和華的一切話，

ccb.text: 沙番的孙子、基玛利雅的儿子米该亚听了卷轴上耶和华的话，
